description_long: This is a robust, double-bit axe featuring a wide, dark metallic head with two symmetrical cutting edges. The blade surfaces show a textured, slightly worn finish, with some areas appearing shinier due to use or polishing. The handle is cylindrical, made of weathered wood, and appears thick and sturdy, suitable for heavy-duty tasks. The axe head is securely mounted atop the handle, with no visible fasteners, suggesting a traditional wedged fit. One side of the blade displays a faint red marking or logo, adding a touch of character to the otherwise utilitarian design. The overall appearance suggests this tool is built for durability and frequent use in urban maintenance or emergency scenarios.
description: A double-bit axe with a dark, textured metal head and a thick, weathered wooden handle. One blade side features a faint red marking.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wide, symmetrical cutting edges and the full width of the axe head.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with a visible faint red marking on the blade's surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and the handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight wooden handle with a weathered, grippy surface and no visible curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bit, symmetrical blade with wide cutting edges and a slightly textured, worn finish; no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit with the blade mounted atop the handle.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: faint red marking or logo on one blade side
